allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5998,5999 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'done'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5999 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output 'done'")

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PS1'
Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5999 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
Write-Output 'done'
PS1)
